q: How do I start a free trial?
a: Go to the signup page, verify your email, and create your agency. You get 7 days of full access with no credit card required.

q: What happens when my trial ends?
a: If you have not added a payment method, your agency is suspended until billing is set up. Add a card in safeT Control → Billing to restore service immediately.
Most agencies are on the air within an hour: create your agency, add radio users in Control, install the Android app, and sign in.

q: What counts as a billable user?
a: Radio/handset accounts (field units) are billed per seat. Dispatcher and admin accounts are included at no extra charge.

q: What is included in Basic vs Pro?
a: Basic ($6.50/radio/mo) includes push-to-talk, the dispatch console, and admin panel. Pro ($8.50/radio/mo) adds AI dispatch on channels you enable.
Every plan includes 3 days of recorded transmissions with auto-transcription. Add unlimited log retention for $20/month per agency.
Yes. Manage your subscription from the Billing page in safeT Control or the Stripe customer portal. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

q: What phones and radios are supported?
a: safeT Mobile runs on Android phones (Android 5.0+), Inrico IRC590, and Inrico TM7 / TM7 Plus handsets. See the full list at /devices.

q: How do I install safeT on Android or Inrico radios?
a: Follow the illustrated guide at /setup/android. It covers APK download, sideloading, Vysor for small screens, IRC590 hardware keys, and TM-7 Plus accessibility (ADB) setup.

q: Do dispatchers need a special app?
a: No. Dispatchers and admins use safeT Command and Control in any modern web browser. Radio-role users can also use a browser-based soft radio.
Yes. Every transmission is carried over an authenticated, encrypted relay. Accounts sign in individually — the newest sign-in wins so a lost device cannot keep listening. Full details at /trust.

q: Is my agency data isolated from others?
a: Yes. safeT PTT is multi-tenant: every account, channel, recording, and transmission belongs to your agency only.

q: Do you have SOC 2 or CJIS certification?
a: SOC 2 Type II is on our roadmap. We do not claim CJIS certification today. Request our security packet at /trust for procurement review.

q: Handsets cannot connect — what should I check?
a: Confirm the agency slug and username/password on the login screen, and verify the radio key in Control matches what is configured on the device.

q: I see 'agency suspended' when signing in
a: Your free trial ended or a payment failed. An agency admin should open safeT Control → Billing and add or update the payment method.

q: No audio on transmit or receive
a: Check microphone permissions on the handset, confirm the unit is on an assigned channel, and verify no other user holds talk-priority on that channel.
On Pro plans, you can enable AI dispatch per channel. The AI listens to radio traffic, parses intents, can look up plates, and integrate with CAD systems like Ten-8.
